heading: Connection Tutorials
body:
> **Important:** To transition to and connect with MongoSQL,
> the newest BI connection tool from MongoDB, see
> [Transition from Atlas BI Connector to MongoSQL](sql-interface/transition-bic-to-atlas-sql).

You can connect from the following clients using the
BI Connector for Atlas:

- Create a System DSN

- Connect from Excel

- Connect from Tableau Desktop

- Connect from Qlik Sense

- Connect from MySQL Workbench

- Connect from Power BI Desktop (Windows)
